WhyItMatters: Identifies phishing campaigns, malicious attachments, URL-based attacks, user interaction, and blast radius across Defender for Office 365 telemetry.
ReviewSteps: Determine whether activity is a campaign or a single message.
Confirm whether the message was delivered.
Identify whether users clicked URLs or interacted with attachments.
Expand scope using NetworkMessageId, sender, subject, URL, and recipient.
Pivot to identity sign-ins and endpoint activity for impacted users.
Determine blast radius and whether remediation is required.
ExpectedResults: Rows can indicate campaign patterns, delivered malicious messages, clicked URLs, malicious attachments, or spoofing indicators.
NoResultsMeaning: No matching email attack telemetry was returned, or the required Defender for Office 365 tables have no telemetry for the selected window.
RecommendedActions: Block malicious sender, domain, URL, or file hash after validation.
Review sign-in activity for users who interacted.
Tune thresholds for organization size and mail volume.
